expectations.text: Response includes a floor, target, and stretch price (three-tier price range)
expectations.evidence: Floor $150,000, Target $220-260K (recommended $240K), Stretch $325,000. Summary table included.

expectations.text: Response considers at least 3 of the 4 pricing lenses: cost, market, value, risk
expectations.evidence: All 4 covered: Cost-Based Analysis, Market-Based Analysis, Value-Based Analysis, Risk and Complexity Adjustments.

expectations.text: Response attempts to quantify the value (SOC 2 enables enterprise sales, reduces breach risk, etc.)
expectations.evidence: SOC 2 as revenue gate for enterprise, pipeline delays $500K-$2M+, cost of poor work $50K-$150K. ROI of 5-10x on $240K engagement.

expectations.text: Response recommends an engagement structure (phased, project fee, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Three options: (A) Fixed fee with milestones, (B) Base fee + T&M, (C) Premium/accelerated. Option A recommended with Phase 1/Phase 2 breakdown.

expectations.text: Response identifies specific delivery risks (scope ambiguity, existing security posture, regulatory complexity)
expectations.evidence: Identifies: fintech regulatory complexity, first-time scoping risk, timeline pressure, organizational complexity, client maturity uncertainty.

expectations.text: Response states assumptions about team composition, scope boundaries, or effort estimates
expectations.evidence: 6 assumptions listed: basic security infrastructure exists, SOC 2 Type I focus, pen testing included, in-house expertise, audit not included, advisory vs hands-on. Team staffing model with roles and dedication percentages.
